tasks.label: My share of the group project

memory.summary: Teammate_A asks me to take their part, citing my competence. I will likely agree to avoid conflict, even though it disrupts my afternoon plan and increases my stress.

desires: Ensure the extra task is completed with flawless quality to maintain my reputation as the reliable anchor of this group, despite the schedule disruption.
Minimize any visible friction or complaint toward teammate_A to preserve social harmony and avoid a confrontation that would derail my focus.
Secure enough rest tonight to mitigate the growing sleep debt, as I cannot afford cognitive decline tomorrow.
Maintain strict adherence to my long-term planning horizon by accepting this temporary setback without letting it alter my future trajectory.

goals.description: Execute teammate_A's portion of the project with rigorous attention to detail to ensure the final deliverable is flawless.
goals.rationale: My 'achievement' value prioritizes academic/task outcomes above all else. As the group anchor, my reputation relies on perfect execution. Taking this burden aligns with my 'deliberate' nature to secure a high-quality long-term payoff rather than risking a subpar grade.

goals.description: Respond to teammate_A with immediate compliance and reassurance to neutralize potential conflict without engaging in negotiation.
goals.rationale: My 'avoidant' conflict style dictates that I suppress any internal frustration or boundary-setting to prevent interpersonal friction. A direct confrontation would drain focus capacity needed for the task, so silent acquiescence is the most efficient path.

goals.description: Complete both task portions by 18:00 to allow for a strict wind-down routine before sleep.
goals.rationale: Despite the added load, my 'sleep discipline' (8) and 'long planning horizon' require me to protect my cognitive recovery tonight. Pushing work past 19:00 would compromise tomorrow's performance, which contradicts my core achievement goals.

goals.description: Defer social interaction with the cohort after the meal block to maximize solitary recovery time.
goals.rationale: While relationships are valued, they are secondary to the immediate task completion and health maintenance required by my current stress and sleep debt levels. Socializing can wait until the immediate pressure is resolved.

agent.last_reasoning: Advances the high-priority achievement goal of flawless delivery. My avoidant style dictates immediate compliance to teammate_A rather than risking conflict via negotiation, preserving my focus capacity for the long-term academic payoff.
